[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1000000 1
1 0011101 4
2 1101000 3
3 0010101 3
4 0101010 3
5 1111100 5
6 0110110 4
7 1111111 a

70 07 1111111 a match 7
